title: The Debate About Chinese Open-Source AI; Ellison’s Bad Day
summary: Axios, meanwhile, reported on Monday that last week’s release of Kimi 3 from Chinese firm Moonshot had stoked conversations about banning foreign open source AI (more on the new Kimi model ).
